+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: AMQP EventSource: exchange and queue customizable parameters",
+    "description": "AMQP EventSource: exchange and queue customizable parameters. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nThe implementation of the `AMQP EventSource` can be more customizable."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for AMQP EventSource: exchange and queue customizable parameters",
+        "description": "This PR aims to fix #1007. \n\nThe following new properties are added to the `AMQPEventSource` object:\n- `ExchangeDeclare` to set the values of the exchange in the server\n- `QueueDeclare` to hold the configuration of a queue to hold messages and deliver to consumers\n- `QueueBind` to hold the configuration that binds an exchange to a queue so that publishings to the exchange will be routed to the queue when the publishing routing key matches the binding routing key\n- `Consume` to hold the\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"AMQP EventSource: exchange and queue customizable parameters\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR aims to fix #1007. \n\nThe following new properties are added to the `AMQPEventSource` object:\n- `ExchangeDeclare` to set the values of the exchange in the server\n- `QueueDeclare` to hold the configuration of a queue to hold messages and deliver to consumers\n- `QueueBind` to hold the configuration that binds an exchange to a queue so that publishings to the exchange will be routed to the",

+    }
+  },
